title: Insufficient Authorization Checks
description: The system lacks proper authorization checks, allowing users to access resources or perform actions they are not authorized to perform. This could lead to a user gaining administrative privileges or accessing sensitive data.
attack_vector: Exploiting vulnerabilities in the access control logic. An attacker could bypass authorization checks and gain elevated privileges.
mitigations: Implement robust access control mechanisms based on the principle of least privilege.
Regularly review and update access control policies.
